name: Cheesecake Cookies Squares
recipeIngredient: Sliced Fruit (Apples, Pears, Peaches, etc.) or Nuts
recipeInstructions: Using a pastry cutter, blend the whole wheat flour, brown sugar, and butter until a crumbly mixture forms. Stir in the chopped nuts or seeds. Set aside half of the mixture for topping. Press the remaining crumbs into an 8-inch square baking dish that has been lightly oiled. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 12-15 minutes. Beat the filling ingredients until smooth and pour over the prepared crust. Sprinkle with the reserved crumb mixture. Add fruit or nuts on top and bake at 350 degrees F. for an additional 25 minutes. Allow to cool, then refrigerate. Cut into 2-inch squares. Store in the refrigerator.
